plan: In FileField.__init__ (django/db/models/fields/files.py ~line 227-238), the callable storage is evaluated and the original callable discarded; save a reference first (e.g. self._storage_callable = self.storage) before calling it. Then in FileField.deconstruct (~line 276-283), when storage is not default_storage, return the saved callable via getattr(self, '_storage_callable', self.storage) instead of the evaluated Storage instance, mirroring how callable upload_to is deconstructed. Add regression tests in tests/file_storage/tests.py asserting deconstruct() returns the original callable reference.
